name: Flipkart SBI Card
joiningBenefits: Rs 250 Flipkart Gift Card on fee realisation
Rs 1,000 additional Flipkart benefit on the first transaction on Flipkart, as per card offer terms
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per statement cycle
additionalDetails: Cashback is credited to the card account and accelerated cashback categories are subject to quarterly caps as defined in SBI Card terms.
internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card product page and Flipkart SBI Card T&C booklet on 2026-06-08.

The live product page currently foregrounds a 12% off Cleartrip offer, but the detailed booklet continues to state 5% cashback on Cleartrip. The card data keeps the durable cashback structure and leaves promotional offer treatment out of the core rewards table.
The Flipkart booklet explicitly states quarterly cashback limits of Rs 4,000 for accelerated cashback categories, so the rewards rows use capStatementQuarter rather than a synthetic monthly cap.
The card is audited from official SBI sources but is not yet marked as manually verified by user.
